description: Comfortable Accommodations:Waldschlössl Gasthof in Sankt Lorenzen ob Murau offers family rooms with private bathrooms, hairdryers, showers, TVs, and private entrances. Each room includes a private bathroom, ensuring a pleasant stay.Exceptional Facilities:Guests can enjoy a sauna, sun terrace, restaurant, bar, and free WiFi. Additional amenities include a child-friendly buffet, bicycle parking, bike hire, tour desk, and luggage storage.Dining Experience:The family-friendly restaurant serves Austrian and Hungarian cuisine with vegetarian, gluten-free, and dairy-free options. Breakfast includes local specialities, warm dishes, fresh pastries, cheese, and juice.Activities and Location:Located 28 km from Krakautal, 7 km from KLH-Arena, and 41 km from Mauterndorf Castle. Winter sports are available nearby. Klagenfurt Airport is 88 km away.

Comfortable Accommodations:Hotel Auszeit St Lambrecht in Sankt Lambrecht offers family rooms with private bathrooms, balconies, and garden or mountain views. Each room includes a work desk, TV, and free WiFi.Wellness and Leisure:Guests can enjoy spa facilities, a swimming pool with a view, sauna, fitness centre, and indoor swimming pool. Additional amenities include a fitness centre, sun terrace, and games room.Dining Experience:The modern restaurant serves local and European cuisines with vegetarian, vegan, gluten-free, and dairy-free options. A buffet breakfast is provided daily.Location and Activities:Located 37 km from Krakautal and 69 km from Klagenfurt Airport, the hotel is ideal for winter sports enthusiasts. Nearby attractions include the Winter Sports Museum.

Waldschlössl Gasthof se encuentra en Sankt Lorenzen ob Murau, a 28 km de Krakautal, y ofrece alojamiento con terraza, parking privado gratis, restaurante y bar. El hotel está a unos 7,1 km de KLH-Arena y a 41 km de Mauterndorf Castle. El hotel dispone de sauna y servicio de conserjería.

Todas las unidades de este alojamiento están equipadas con TV de pantalla plana con canales por cable. Las habitaciones de este alojamiento disponen de wifi gratis y de baño privado con ducha y secador de pelo. En el hotel, todas las habitaciones cuentan con ropa de cama y toallas.

En Waldschlössl Gasthof se sirve un desayuno buffet.

La zona es ideal para practicar senderismo y esquí, y hay alquiler de bicicletas eneste hotel de 3 estrellas.

El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto de Klagenfurt) está a 88 km.

Die Gegend ist beliebt zum Wandern und Skifahren. Ein Fahrradverleih ist an diesem Hotel mit 3-Sterne verfügbar.
